regime_scorecard.summary: Regime labels assigned via offline ADX/ATR heuristic with calibrated ATR threshold=61.82 (p75). Distribution: TREND=849 (24.3%), RANGE=1697 (48.5%), HIGH_VOL_CHAOTIC=950 (27.2%). Labels are estimated, not runtime-derived. Regime split enables strategy entry evaluation.

scenario_results.notes: Full replay completed with calibrated ATR=61.82 (p75). run_id=replay-f270366bef3c-0001. 8 signals (4 buy + 4 sell), 4 closed trades. deterministic_replay_ok=True. Gate=FAIL (min_closed_trades_total, min_profit_factor, min_expectancy_r). Economics fields largely unavailable from current replay runner.
Baseline replay with committed ATR=2.0: 0 signals, 0 trades. 99.5% HIGH_VOL_CHAOTIC blocks all entries. Confirms the calibration was necessary to produce any strategy signals.
ATR=48.01 (p50): 6 signals, 3 closed trades. Regime: 51.4% HVC, 14.4% TREND, 34.2% RANGE. Representative of median volatility.
ATR=76.84 (p90): 10 signals, 5 closed trades. Regime: 9.8% HVC, 33.2% TREND, 57.0% RANGE. Most permissive non-extreme threshold.

limitations: Only 4 closed trades over 58h (3496 1m candles) -- insufficient for statistical significance.

Profit factor 0.517 at 4 trades is not evidence of strategy weakness; it is evidence of insufficient data. 1 win and 3 losses at single-digit trade count can produce any profit factor by random chance.

Gross return, net return, expectancy, max drawdown, avg_win, avg_loss, and cost metrics are unavailable from current replay runner. This is a replay runner limitation, not a dataset or strategy limitation.
Regime labels are estimated via offline ADX/ATR heuristic, not runtime-derived. They are controlled_lab_evidence.
Fees, spread, and slippage assumed zero. MEXC BTCUSDT spot fees are typically 0.0% maker/taker. Realistic cost modeling requires replay runner extension.
Calibrated ATR threshold (61.82) is derived from this specific 58h BTCUSDT MEXC window. No claim of generalizability to other time periods, symbols, or venues.
This evidence packet v2 supersedes the v1 packet (#3141) which had all-zero metrics due to blocked execution.
Dataset window: 2026-06-06T13:43Z to 2026-06-08T23:58Z. This is a single contiguous period with no regime diversity (no long-term trend or sustained low-vol period).
safety_boundaries: LR remains NO-GO. This packet does not constitute any form of live trading approval.
Board 'trade-capable' stage does not authorize live capital or strategy promotion.
Calibrated ATR threshold is controlled_lab_evidence only. No production config change has been made or is authorized by this packet.
Recommendation PARK means: do not promote. Do not allocate capital. Do not run paper. Wait for longer dataset and richer economics output.
Profit factor 0.517 is documented as-is without interpretation as strategy profitability or lack thereof.
All regime labels are explicitly marked as estimated. They are NOT runtime-derived.
Strategy code, core replay, runner, provider, and schema are unchanged from main.
No automatic promotion to BACKTESTED, PAPER_VALIDATED, or any downstream gate is authorized by this packet.
